title: zanthoxylum pinnatum
intro: Zanthoxylum pinnatum, also known as the Korean prickly ash, is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal effects. The health benefits of Zanthoxylum pinnatum include relief from pain and inflammation, as well as potential applications in the treatment of various diseases such as diabetes and cancer. In herbal preparations, Zanthoxylum pinnatum is often used in the form of dried roots, which can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for medicinal purposes.
